channel.title: Government on SuperList.us
channel.description: Recent content in Government on SuperList.us

item.title: Santa Claus Post Office
item.description: The post office in Santa Claus, Indiana, gets absolutely slammed every December with people mailing Christmas cards just so they get the “Santa Claus, IN” postmark. The town is also home to Holiday World theme park. Yes, the entire town’s personality is Christmas. Year-round.

item.title: Okay, OK Post Office
item.description: The post office in Okay, Oklahoma. It’s not great, it’s not terrible — it’s just Okay. The town was named after O.K. Trucks, a brand of oil tanker trucks manufactured there in 1919. Home to about 500 people. The zip code is 74446. The vibes are acceptable.
